narrative:
Bay Village-01-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 995 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.7 percentage points.
